action.proof_term:
intro r R P hr hpair
have hex : ∃ e : Fin r, ∀ i : Fin r, i ≠ e → P i ≤ R := by
  by_cases hlarge : ∃ e : Fin r, R < P e
  · obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hlarge
    refine ⟨e, ?_⟩
    intro i hie
    rcases hpair i e hie with hi | he'
    · exact hi
    · omega
  · let e : Fin r := ⟨0, hr⟩
    refine ⟨e, ?_⟩
    intro i _
    exact le_of_not_gt (fun hi => hlarge ⟨i, hi⟩)
obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hex
refine ⟨e, ?_⟩
calc
  (∏ i ∈ Finset.univ.erase e, P i) ≤
      ∏ _i ∈ Finset.univ.erase e, R := by
    apply Finset.prod_le_prod'
    intro i hi
    exact he i (Finset.ne_of_mem_erase hi)
  _ = R ^ (Finset.univ.erase e).card := by simp
  _ = R ^ (r - 1) := by
    rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_univ e)]
    simp

intro r R P hr hpair
have hex : ∃ e : Fin r, ∀ i : Fin r, i ≠ e → P i ≤ R := by
  by_cases hlarge : ∃ e : Fin r, R < P e
  · obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hlarge
    refine ⟨e, ?_⟩
    intro i hie
    rcases hpair i e hie with hi | he'
    · exact hi
    · omega
  · let e : Fin r := ⟨0, hr⟩
    refine ⟨e, ?_⟩
    intro i _
    exact le_of_not_gt (fun hi => hlarge ⟨i, hi⟩)
obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hex
refine ⟨e, ?_⟩
calc
  (∏ i ∈ Finset.univ.erase e, P i) ≤
      ∏ _i ∈ Finset.univ.erase e, R := by
    apply Finset.prod_le_prod'
    intro i hi
    exact he i (Finset.ne_of_mem_erase hi)
  _ = R ^ (Finset.univ.erase e).card := by simp
  _ = R ^ (r - 1) := by
    rw [Finset.card_erase_of_mem (Finset.mem_univ e)]
    simp

info.lean_statement:
∀ (r R : ℕ) (P : Fin r → ℕ),
  0 < r →
  (∀ i j : Fin r, i ≠ j → P i ≤ R ∨ P j ≤ R) →
  ∃ e : Fin r,
    (∏ i ∈ Finset.univ.erase e, P i) ≤ R ^ (r - 1)

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
